# Assessment Overview

This index lists supplementary assessment documents available for this report.

- [architecture-diagram.md](./architecture-diagram.md) - High-level and component-level architecture diagrams.
- [dependency-map.md](./dependency-map.md) - External dependency map grouped by functional category.
- [api-service-contracts.md](./api-service-contracts.md) - Service catalog, endpoint inventory, and communication contracts.
- [data-architecture.md](./data-architecture.md) - Database configuration, entity model, and persistence analysis.
- [configuration-inventory.md](./configuration-inventory.md) - Configuration sources, profiles, secrets, and runtime settings inventory.
- [business-workflows.md](./business-workflows.md) - Primary business workflows, rules, and sequence diagram.
